stemHtml:
Determine the mass that needs to be moved from hold 1 to 3 to relocate the CG to 40% MAC, given:

Length of the mean aerodynamic chord 7.5 m
Moment arm of hold 1: -4.50 m
Moment arm of hold 2: -1.50 m
Moment arm of hold 3: 2.75 m
Moment arm of hold 4: 5.5 m

The aircraft mass is 22000 kg and its CG is at 25% MAC.
